title: Melted Mature Saudi Arabian Cheddar Tagine
description: A tangy and gooey Saudi Arabian dish featuring mature cheddar, confit tomato, and Mediterranean flavors, cooked to perfection in a tagine pot.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the shredded cheese, confit tomatoes, olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, parsley, salt, black pepper, and tagine spice mix.
Transfer the mixture to a tagine pot or a similar clay pot with a conical lid.
Add the water to the pot and cover it with the lid.
Place the pot in the oven and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the lid and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the melted cheese hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
